text.title: SOC2 Control-to-Repo Artifact Map Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when soc2-control-to-repo-artifact-map is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), a root cause (`reason`), and a corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Auditor asks for change-management evidence; team scrambles to assemble PR list manually.
antipattern.reason: Artifact path missing; evidence retrieved ad hoc.
antipattern.note: Fix: Pre-map artifact path (e.g. all PRs with `compliance/cm` label); automate evidence export.

antipattern.description: Audit log retention is 30 days; auditor needs 6 months.
antipattern.note: Fix: Document retention per control; align infra to strictest.

antipattern.description: Map exists once at audit prep, never refreshed.
antipattern.note: Fix: Add quarterly review; assign owner; bake into compliance OKR.
